calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DENIS KLAVDIANOS of Glassberg, Pollak & Associates, Tel No. (415) 291-8320 appearing for Petitioner Main Street Business Loans, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
